shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @Elijah-001: identical presenter face, workwear wardrobe, blueprint bench set, same eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Warehouse-Industrial-001: identical industrial loft — same window grid camera-left, same concrete floor, same brick tone, same beam geometry — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Blueprint-Technical-001: blueprint technical grade — navy-base low saturation, cyan schematic accent on diagrams only, accurate workwear color, minimal stylistic grading, systems trust, no Observable clinical cast, no DAVID warm amber. Presenter addresses camera on warehouse bench, surprising failure mode or daily-use system hook. Camera: locked medium, direct address. Industrial window 4800K directional key locked — dust motes optional, deep shadow pockets, no magenta brick bounce, no cool fill contamination, zero hue drift. Industrial 4800K window key locked — deep shadow pockets for dimension, no magenta brick bounce, no cool fill contamination. COLOR LOCK Warehouse: brick #8B4A3B desaturated, concrete #A8A8A8, metal #5C5C5C, window light warm-neutral 4800K — no purple shadows, no teal concrete, no neon practicals. GRADE LOCK Blueprint-Technical: host skin true-to-life, wardrobe earth-neutral, diagram accents cyan #3DB8E8 on navy #0A1628 only — forbid full-frame warm lamp cast, forbid magenta fog, forbid orange global, forbid Observable grey clinical on host. Locked-off or slow linear track; no handheld. Lip-synced, delivers: "Template validation spoken line." deep measured baritone, unhurried authoritative systems walk-through, synthetic presenter only. Finish on presentational gesture peak, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.
